tweets.full_text:
I just paid $321 for a coding session where Fable 5 refused to do the work.

Here is where the work actually went:

Fable 5: $78
Opus 4.8: $242

75% of the session got routed to Opus because the new classifiers kept flagging routine coding work as cybersecurity risk.

The model I https://t.co/mCM2mPEJrn
tweets.summary: 用户花$321进行编码会话，Fable 5拒绝工作，75%任务被路由到Opus 4.8（$242），新分类器误将常规代码工作标记为网络安全风险。
angles: Fable 5翻车实录：$321却只干了$78的活

tweets.full_text: it's not a witch hunt and it's not detecting 100% of AI fics—the false negative rate is astronomical. it just has a 0% false positive rate because a fic that didn't use claude in some way would never have claude fingerprints in the html <p> elements https://t.co/nzcMSQl24H

media.ext_alt_text:
a venn diagram
A: AI was used
not A: AI was not used
B (overlapping both A and not-A): fics flagged by normal AI detectors
C (within A, partially overlapping B): fics flagged by this new claude detector
